What about the proposed changes have raised concerns among the trans community? What has the Supreme Court laid down in the landmark 2014 judgement recognising a third gender beyond male and female and the right to self-determination of gender identity?

dailyNews.title: Cuba confirms talks with Trump officials; President Miguel Diaz-Canel seeks solutions amid severe energy crisis
dailyNews.description: Oil shipments from Venezuela to Cuba were halted after the United States attacked Venezuela and arrested President Nicolás Maduro, deepening Cuba’s energy crisis.

dailyNews.title: Vance touts Trump economy gains during North Carolina tour, cites rising home purchases
dailyNews.description: VP JD Vance claims economy improving in North Carolina campaign visit, touts rising home purchases and falling rents while campaigning for GOP candidates.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration says Colorado school district may have put up to 61 male students on girls sports teams
dailyNews.description: A Colorado school district was found by U.S. Department of Education to be in violation of Title IX for allegedly allowing male students access to female bathrooms and girls sports.

dailyNews.title: Vance reveals $19B fraud uncovered in Minneapolis, hints California is next target
dailyNews.description: JD Vance alleges $19 billion in fraud was discovered in Minneapolis, and the Trump administration may target California for its next major federal investigation.

dailyNews.title: Trump welcomes PRCA, WPRA champions at White House in return of rodeo tradition
dailyNews.description: Rodeo buckle winners visited the White House for the first time in more than four decades when President Donald Trump hosted PRCA and WPRA world champions.

dailyNews.title: White House erupts over CNN report claiming Trump team underestimated Iran response on Hormuz
dailyNews.description: The White House press secretary denied a CNN report claiming the Trump team was unprepared for the potential Iranian closure of the Strait of Hormuz, calling it "fake news."

dailyNews.title: Trump Kennedy Center's new leader revealed as Ric Grenell exits top role
dailyNews.description: Ric Grenell is stepping down as the Trump Kennedy Center president as the venue shifts focus to major renovations. VP Matt Floca is taking over leadership.

dailyNews.title: Cuban president reveals talks with Trump admin as fuel blockade chokes domestic energy supply and economy
dailyNews.description: Cuba confirmed talks with the Trump administration amid an economic crisis after Venezuela oil was cut off. President Miguel Díaz-Canel cites aim to resolve differences.

dailyNews.title: Trump says US ‘obliterated’ military targets in strike on key Iranian oil hub: 'Powerful bombing raids'
dailyNews.description: President Trump said the U.S. bombed Iran’s Kharg Island, a key Iranian oil export hub, and warned against interference in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. "obliterated" every target on Kharg Island; Iran war nears 2-week mark
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Friday that the U.S. military had conducted "one of the most power bombing raids" on Iran's Kharg Island, a vital oil hub for the country.

dailyNews.title: 3/9: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Trump tells CBS war in Iran is "pretty much" complete; two charged in "ISIS-inspired" attack outside New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's home.
